name: Brew & Foam
tagline: Hidden in a Waialua shopping center away from tourist Haleiwa — serious baristas and one of the best matcha lattes on the island.
talkStory: Tucked in an unassuming Waialua shopping center far from tourist Haleiwa, Brew & Foam is where North Shore locals actually get their coffee. The owners are competition-trained baristas who left Honolulu’s cafe scene for the country lifestyle. Their ceremonial-grade matcha latte is widely considered the best on the island — they whisk it properly, Japanese-style. The espresso pulls rival anything in town. Come any morning for zero wait and genuine talk story with the baristas.
